## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits style PR title (`feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or large binaries committed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Updated docs (README / CONTRIBUTING / inline) if behavior changed
